title: Valid login redirects to dashboard
description:
As a user, when I enter valid credentials on the login page, I should be redirected to the dashboard.

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /login
2. Enter email: alice@example.com
3. Enter password: admin123
4. Click "Sign In"
5. Verify redirected to /dashboard
6. Verify dashboard displays username

Expected: User sees dashboard with their name in nav
